CustomField.formula: CASE( Web_Form_Name__c, "669yd8", "Webinar Zoom Registered", "669ydb", "Webinar Zoom Attended", "64k8mj", "Webinar Upcoming", "64k8ml", "Webinar Recorded", "64k8mn", "Report", "64dgkj", "Registration", "68hxw1", "Fro Hooks Support", "68hxvy", "Fro Hooks Sales", "68hxw3", "Fro Hooks Other", "64k8mg", "Fro Hooks", "64dgkn", "Contact Support", "64k8md", "Contact Sales", "64k8mb", "Contact Pricing", "64k8m8", "Contact API", "")
CustomField.label: Web Form Name
